scripts.start: node -e "import http from 'http'; import fs from 'fs'; const server = http.createServer((req, res) => { const filePath = req.url === '/' ? './index.html' : '.' + req.url; const ext = filePath.split('.').pop(); const mimeTypes = { html: 'text/html', css: 'text/css', js: 'text/javascript', json: 'application/json' }; fs.readFile(filePath, (err, data) => { if (err) { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found'); } else { res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': mimeTypes[ext] || 'text/plain' }); res.end(data); } }); }); server.listen(3000, () => console.log('Frontend running on http://localhost:3000')); "
scripts.dev: node -e "import http from 'http'; import fs from 'fs'; const server = http.createServer((req, res) => { const filePath = req.url === '/' ? './index.html' : '.' + req.url; const ext = filePath.split('.').pop(); const mimeTypes = { html: 'text/html', css: 'text/css', js: 'text/javascript', json: 'application/json' }; fs.readFile(filePath, (err, data) => { if (err) { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found'); } else { res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': mimeTypes[ext] || 'text/plain' }); res.end(data); } }); }); server.listen(3000, () => console.log('Frontend running on http://localhost:3000')); "
